entities.name: ATS (Applicant Tracking System)

entities.name: Two-resume strategy
entities.context: Maintaining ATS-friendly keyword-dense version and personality-forward version for direct introductions

entities.context: Detached, jaded frame treating resumes and LinkedIn as hoops rather than reflections of worth

entities.name: Job search as soul compromise
entities.context: V's belief that modern job search requires writing about yourself in unnatural ways

entities.name: Content publishing for visibility
entities.context: Publishing short thoughtful pieces weekly to give hiring managers more context than resumes

entities.name: Voice-to-AI workflow
entities.context: Record voice notes about topics, feed to AI with instructions to only organize existing ideas into drafts

entities.name: LinkedIn
entities.context: Platform for professional presence requiring optimization tweaks

entities.name: AI tools
entities.context: Used to organize voice notes into structured outlines or drafts

relationships.context: Career coaching on resume variants, emotional framing, and content strategy
Explicit that modern job search requires compromising authenticity to sell yourself
Encourages detached frame seeing optimization as hoops not self-worth
Converged with Daniel on need for ATS and personality variants
Proposed workflow Daniel recalls V describing in the past

Now uses AI tools himself, making the workflow feel more approachable
